start:
👋 Welcome!

🎬 Send me a video, and I’ll quickly extract the audio for you — simple, fast, and reliable.
buy-diamonds: Buy Diamonds 💎 with Telegram Stars Diamonds unlock: • Unlimited conversions • Large file support 🔥 Save 30% with the 50 diamond pack! 💳 Payment via ⭐ Telegram Stars
buy-desc:
You are about to purchase {} 💎 diamonds.

Total cost: {} ⭐ Telegram Stars

Each diamond gives you more conversions and removes limits.
lifetime-desc:
One-time purchase.
Unlimited uploads and conversions — forever.
too-large: 💎 ⚠️ File too large This video exceeds the free limit ({} MB). Use 💎 1 diamond or upgrade to Premium.
large-used: 💎 1 diamond used Large file upload unlocked.
daily-limit: ⛔ Daily limit reached You’ve used all free conversions for today. Use a diamond or buy more below.
congrats: 🎉 Success! {} diamonds have been added to your account.
congrats-lifetime: 🎉 Lifetime Premium Activated! You now have unlimited access forever.
subscribe: 🔔 Please subscribe to our channel to continue using the bot.
not-sub: ❌ You need to subscribe to the channel before you can use the bot. Please join and try again!
thank-sub: ✅ Thank you for subscribing! You can now send a video file, and I’ll extract the audio for you.
help-text: 🆘 How It Works 1️⃣ Send a video file 2️⃣ Wait while we extract the audio 3️⃣ Download and enjoy 💎 Need more power? Use diamonds for unlimited access and large files. Still need help? Just ask!
admin-gift: 🎁 Gift received! 💎 {count} diamonds have been added to your account by the admin.
server-busy: ⚠️ Server is busy right now. Please try again in a few minutes.
error-server: ⚠️ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
no-diamonds: 💎 No diamonds left! Please buy more diamonds to continue.
queue-wait: ⏳ Your previous video is still processing. Please wait.
no-audio: 🔇 This video has no audio track.
referral-applied: 🎁 Referral code applied! You'll get 1 💎 diamond after your first conversion.
referral-first-start: Please start the bot first with /start
referral-info: 🎁 Your Referral Link {link} Share this link and get: • 2 💎 diamonds for each friend who converts • Your friend gets 1 💎 diamond after first conversion 🏆 Milestone Rewards: • 50 conversions → 5 💎 • 100 conversions → 10 💎 • 200 conversions → 20 💎 • 500 conversions → 50 💎
referral-bonus: 🎁 Referral bonus! 💎 +1 diamond for you 💎 +2 diamonds for your inviter
social-too-long: ⏱️ Video too long. Maximum is {} minutes.
social-error-blocked: Your IP is blocked by {}. Try again later or use VPN.
social-error-copyright: Content blocked by copyright in your region.
referral-invalid: ⚠️ Invalid referral code or already applied.
referral-share-text: Join this bot with my link and get bonus diamonds after your first conversion!
limit-invite-tip: 3) 👥 Invite a friend and earn referral diamonds.
